# Requirements Readiness Checklist: Demais Telas por Perfil de Acesso

**Purpose**: Validate whether the feature requirements, plan, data model, and contracts are complete, clear, consistent, and ready for task generation.
**Created**: 2026-06-28
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. It validates requirements quality, not implementation behavior.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all 9 routes in scope, including the required page, RBAC module, and legacy HTML reference for each route? [Completeness, Spec §Contexto e Escopo, Contracts §UI Routes]
- [x] CHK002 Are the financial requirements complete across Fluxo de Caixa, Contas a Pagar, Contas a Receber, and Cobrancas without leaving any financial workflow unspecified? [Completeness, Spec §US1, Spec §FR-006-008, Spec §FR-011]
- [x] CHK003 Are the commercial requirements complete across Propostas, Contratos, and Cobrancas, including status changes, customer links, contract origin, and integration-pending actions? [Completeness, Spec §US2, Spec §FR-009-011]
- [x] CHK004 Are Equipe requirements complete for both Gerente de Projetos and Tecnico, including limited technical visibility and self-service profile updates? [Completeness, Spec §US3, Spec §FR-012, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK005 Are Configuracoes requirements complete for both Administrador global settings and Tecnico self-only settings? [Completeness, Spec §US4, Spec §FR-014]
- [x] CHK006 Are Relatorios requirements complete for Visualizador read-only use and for privileged profiles with permitted categories? [Completeness, Spec §US5, Spec §FR-013]
- [x] CHK007 Are seed/data-initialization requirements specific enough to support every profile and every route it can access? [Completeness, Spec §FR-018, Plan §Technical Context]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK008 Is "dados reais" defined clearly enough to distinguish persisted domain data from allowed static UI text? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002, Spec §SC-002]
- [x] CHK009 Is "fonte principal" for `reference/legacy-html/` clearly scoped to layout, hierarchy, components, and behavior rather than business rules? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003A, Research §D1]
- [x] CHK010 Are "acoes sem integracao externa" requirements explicit about which actions become unavailable, pending, or status-only? [Clarity, Spec §Fora de escopo, Spec §Edge Cases, Research §D6]
- [x] CHK011 Are "dados sensiveis" categories defined specifically enough for Tecnico and Visualizador restrictions? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-019]
- [x] CHK012 Are criteria for "alteracoes sensiveis" and "acoes destrutivas" specific enough to determine audit coverage without interpretation? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017, Data Model §Auditoria]
- [x] CHK013 Are status derivation rules for vencido/proximo vencimento clear about stored state versus computed display state? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases, Data Model §lancamentos, Data Model §contratos]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK014 Are RBAC rules consistent between the spec route table, UI route contract, and profile validation notes? [Consistency, Spec §Contexto e Escopo, Contracts §UI Routes]
- [x] CHK015 Is the decision to keep `lancamentos` as the financial source consistent across the spec, research, data model, and financeiro RPC contract? [Consistency, Research §D2, Data Model §lancamentos, Contracts §Financeiro RPC]
- [x] CHK016 Are cobranca responsibilities consistent between financial and commercial requirements, avoiding conflicting ownership for payment and reminder actions? [Consistency, Spec §US1-2, Research §D3, Contracts §Comercial RPC]
- [x] CHK017 Are requirements for zero mocks consistent across route UI, seeds, reports, external integrations, and empty states? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-018, Quickstart §C8]
- [x] CHK018 Are Configuracoes RBAC requirements consistent with navigation and guard requirements after permissions change? [Consistency, Spec §US4, Spec §US6]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK019 Are all success criteria measurable without relying on implementation-specific assertions? [Measurability, Spec §Success Criteria]
- [x] CHK020 Is the 3-second performance target tied to a defined data volume or seed baseline? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004, Plan §Performance Goals]
- [x] CHK021 Are success criteria traceable to the six user stories and the route/domain contracts? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios, Contracts]
- [x] CHK022 Are persistence success criteria explicit about post-action state refresh and reload consistency? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005, Spec §FR-020]
- [x] CHK023 Are forbidden-write criteria explicit enough to cover both hidden UI actions and data-layer rejection? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK024 Are primary flows documented for all profile families: Financeiro, Comercial, Projetos, Tecnico, Administrador, and Visualizador? [Coverage, Spec §User Scenarios]
- [x] CHK025 Are alternate flows documented for users with partial access, especially Comercial in Cobrancas and Tecnico in Equipe/Configuracoes? [Coverage, Spec §US1, Spec §US3-4]
- [x] CHK026 Are exception flows documented for missing external integrations, data load failures, and invalid persisted states? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK027 Are recovery requirements documented for failed writes, partial integration requests, and retryable load failures? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK028 Are direct URL access and sidebar visibility requirements both covered for every profile? [Coverage, Spec §US6, Contracts §UI Routes]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK029 Are empty-state requirements defined per section type, not only as a generic page-level rule? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Contracts §UI Routes]
- [x] CHK030 Are filter-without-result requirements defined consistently for tables, charts, cards, and report previews? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK031 Are requirements defined for users whose permissions change while authenticated? [Gap, Spec §US4, Spec §US6]
- [x] CHK032 Are requirements defined for records linked to missing or inactive related entities, such as inactive clients, ended contracts, or unavailable team members? [Gap, Data Model §Relationships]
- [x] CHK033 Are requirements defined for duplicate or conflicting financial/commercial records, such as a cobranca linked to an existing lancamento? [Gap, Data Model §cobrancas]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK034 Are security requirements specific enough for RPC grants, `auth.uid()` validation, RBAC checks, and RLS fallback coverage? [Completeness, Plan §Constraints, Research §D7]
- [x] CHK035 Are privacy requirements explicit for PII, financial values, cost/hour, documents, and user configuration data? [Completeness, Spec §FR-019, Data Model]
- [x] CHK036 Are auditability requirements specific enough to identify every event that must be recorded and the actor/source data expected? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017, Data Model §Auditoria]
- [x] CHK037 Are accessibility requirements for the migrated legacy screens intentionally excluded or missing? [Gap]
- [x] CHK038 Are responsive layout requirements for the 9 migrated screens intentionally excluded or missing? [Gap, Spec §FR-003A]
- [x] CHK039 Are performance requirements defined for all critical route families, not only a general page-load target? [Gap, Spec §SC-004]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK040 Are assumptions about unavailable integrations documented for each affected command: email, boleto, documents, and report export? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Research §D6]
- [x] CHK041 Are dependencies on feature 004 entities (`clientes`, `projetos`, `tarefas`, `lancamentos`) explicitly documented with ownership boundaries? [Dependency, Data Model §Entidades existentes reutilizadas]
- [x] CHK042 Are assumptions about `docs/telas.md` being auxiliary and `reference/legacy-html/` being primary consistently stated across spec and plan? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Summary]
- [x] CHK043 Are Supabase platform assumptions documented, including Data API exposure changes and RPC grant requirements? [Dependency, Research §D7, Plan §Constraints]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [x] CHK044 Is the relationship between module names in RBAC and route names fully specified for modules with shared responsibility, especially `cobrancas`? [Ambiguity, Spec §Contexto e Escopo, Contracts §UI Routes]
- [x] CHK045 Is the boundary between report preview, report scheduling, and export generation clear enough to avoid implementing fake exports? [Ambiguity, Spec §US5, Contracts §Relatorios]
- [x] CHK046 Is the expected behavior of `Configuracoes > Usuarios` sufficiently defined when changing a user's profile affects their active session? [Ambiguity, Spec §US4]
- [x] CHK047 Is the use of existing `alocacoes_projeto` versus new `alocacoes_equipe` clear enough to avoid duplicate access-control sources for Tecnico? [Ambiguity, Research §D5, Data Model §alocacoes_equipe]
- [x] CHK048 Is the source of truth for vencido status consistent between `lancamentos`, `cobrancas`, and UI display requirements? [Potential Conflict, Data Model §lancamentos, Data Model §cobrancas]

## Notes

- Focus areas selected: requirements readiness, RBAC/security clarity, no-mock/data-source consistency, external integration boundaries, route coverage.
- Depth level: Standard-to-formal reviewer checklist for pre-task generation.
- Audience/timing: reviewer before `/speckit-tasks`.

## Verification Summary

**Verified**: 2026-06-28
**Result**: 48/48 items complete after requirements corrections. Ready for `/speckit-tasks`.

### Resolved Items

- CHK007: Added seed coverage matrix by profile/route in spec and quickstart.
- CHK010: Added integration-absent outcome table by affected command in spec and contracts.
- CHK016/CHK044: Added shared ownership rule for `cobrancas` across Comercial, Financeiro, and Administrador.
- CHK026/CHK027: Added invalid-state, failed-write, retry, and partial-integration recovery rules.
- CHK029/CHK030: Added empty-state and filter-without-result rules by section type.
- CHK031/CHK046: Added active-session behavior after profile/status changes.
- CHK032/CHK033: Added rules for inactive/missing relations and duplicate cobranca/lancamento conflicts.
- CHK035: Added PII and sensitive-business-data classification.
- CHK037/CHK038: Added accessibility and responsive requirements.
- CHK039: Added performance targets by route family.
- CHK047: Clarified `alocacoes_projeto` versus `alocacoes_equipe`.
- CHK048: Defined a single derived-source rule for `Vencido`.
